action.content:
Expand the riddle into a story with a funny tone:

What can you catch but not throw?
A cold

Use * to highlight at least 2 sections in your text. For example: *this is a highlighted text section*.
action.label: context

Once upon a time, there was a man named Gary. Gary was a very ordinary man, but he had a very peculiar habit. Every single day, he would go to the grocery store and buy a cold. He would take it home, put it in the refrigerator, and then he would eat it. He would say, "I'm starving!" and then he would go to bed. He would wake up the next morning and say, "I'm hungry again!" and then he would go to bed again. He would do this every single day for years and years. Eventually, Gary would die of starvation. But he would not die of the cold. He would die of hunger. And that was because he had never learned how to throw a cold.
